# Copilot Instructions for `nuget-foundation`

## Documentation rules

- Write documentation in English.
- Write for external package consumers, not for internal collaborators.
- Prefer product-style documentation with sections such as quick start, package overview, related packages, and API reference.
- Do not mention AI agents, collaboration workflow, intermediate status, or internal working notes in published documentation.
- When in doubt, follow the tone and structure of official product documentation.

## Scope

- Keep documentation focused on `Italbytz.Common.*` packages and their public role as shared building blocks.
- Favor concise, skimmable guidance over repository history.
